title: Phonk on disks
description: This resource pack replaces the music of some disks with phonk.
body:
This resource pack replaces the music of some disks with phonk.

Phonk included in the resource pack:
- FUNKED UP (SLOWED)
- BAS BAS KOTAKBAS FUNK (Super Slowed & Reverb)
- MONTAGEM DOMER (Super Slowed)
- Cuando se moja la tarea (Japanese Remix)
- MEOW MEOW (SUPER SLOWED)
